hypothesis: Hand-painted watercolor references outperform AI-generated devotional art
action: Wired 5 user-uploaded devotional SKUs (Radha-Krishna peacock, Sita Ram, Ram Darbar, Radha-Krishna teal, Shiva neon). Archived 4 off-focus assets (Porsche x2, forest, F1) to .agent/archive/future-categories/. Flagged F1 for trademark risk (Oracle/Bybit/Red Bull logos).
